---
name: Feature request
about: Propose a new doc-type, component, recipe, or capability
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## What problem does this solve?

(What can't you do today, or what's awkward about the current workflow?)

## What would the feature look like?

(Describe the proposed doc-type / component / recipe / capability. Be specific about inputs and outputs.)

## Who would benefit?

(Which audience / industry / use case? Anyone beyond you?)

## Existing workarounds

(How are you doing this today, if at all?)

## Alternatives considered

(Other designs you thought about and rejected, with why)

## Are you willing to contribute?

- [ ] I can write the doc-type spec / component HTML
- [ ] I can test it on a real doc once built
- [ ] I'm just proposing; no commitment to implement

## Additional context

(Related issues, prior art in other factories / design systems / templating tools)
